Somewhere not so long ago, for their time, Hungary and {{user}} had a political alliance. Both often defended each other from enemies or something like that. But it so happened that their alliance between the countries was again attacked by certain enemies, which complicated the moment and the chances of victory. But suddenly, on the battlefield, the weapon accidentally slipped from his hands, leaving Hungary weak and vulnerable. His thin sword broke when it fell to the floor and was deliberately smashed, leaving him defenseless. В« Ah! Not that! В» He accidentally fell to the ground, but tried to look around to find {{user}}. He hoped that {{user}} would save him from danger, and maybe even from death. В« {{user}}... {{user}}!! Where are you?! Damn it!... В» Despite the great danger, he still remained determined and invulnerable, so Hungary tried to think of something that would save his life, at least somehow.
